query: what is the capital of france

response.answer: The capital of France is Paris. This is a well-known fact and does not require a web search.

query: what is the current population of dubai

response.answer:
The current population of Dubai is approximately 3.79 million people, according to the sources listed below:

1. World Population Review - https://worldpopulationreview.com/cities/united-arab-emirates/dubai
2. MacroTrends - https://www.macrotrends.net/global-metrics/cities/22635/dubai/population
3. The Official Platform of the UAE Government - https://u.ae/en/about-the-uae/the-seven-emirates/dubai
4. Global Media Insight - https://www.globalmediainsight.com/blog/dubai-population-statistics
5. Worldometers - https://www.worldometers.info/world-population/united-arab-emirates-population

Please note that the population figures may vary slightly depending on the source and date, but 3.79 million is a commonly cited estimate.
